use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons for confirmations and deletions
Outline-style buttons for secondary actions in UI
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Ghost buttons for subtle navigation elements
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management, and subtle shadow effects for depth. Part of a booking form system, designed for versatile use across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tools interfaces with responsive desktop and mobile support.
